tweets.text:
IT'S A SCAM: Sometimes businesses and websites pretend to be immigration experts or say they have special connections to the government. They might also “guarantee” that you can get a visa, Green Card, or work permit faster if you pay a fee.
Learn more: https://t.co/ai1RmoYZZo
tweets.text_resolved:
IT'S A SCAM: Sometimes businesses and websites pretend to be immigration experts or say they have special connections to the government. They might also “guarantee” that you can get a visa, Green Card, or work permit faster if you pay a fee.
Learn more: https://www.uscis.gov/scams-fraud-and-misconduct/avoid-scams/common-scams

tweets.text: With help from our Baltimore Fraud Detection & National Security team, a scammer has been apprehended. Before the U.S. District Court for the District of Md. Douglas Eze pled to 2 counts of false swearing in an immigration matter. He'll be sentenced on 05/21/2025.

tweets.text: All aliens 14 years of age or older (with limited exceptions) who were not fingerprinted or registered when applying for a U.S. visa and who remain in the U.S. for 30 days or longer, must apply for registration and fingerprinting.
tweets.text_resolved: All aliens 14 years of age or older (with limited exceptions) who were not fingerprinted or registered when applying for a U.S. visa and who remain in the U.S. for 30 days or longer, must apply for registration and fingerprinting.

author.description:
Official X account of U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services. 
Apply to be a Homeland Defender NOW: https://t.co/ataEwyi3UT

tweets.text: Parents and guardians must ensure that their children below the age of 14 are registered. Within 30 days of reaching his or her 14th birthday, the previously registered alien child must apply for re-registration and to be fingerprinted.
tweets.text_resolved: Parents and guardians must ensure that their children below the age of 14 are registered. Within 30 days of reaching his or her 14th birthday, the previously registered alien child must apply for re-registration and to be fingerprinted.

tweets.text: Once an alien has registered and appeared for fingerprinting (unless waived), @DHSgov will issue evidence of registration, which aliens over the age of 18 must carry and keep in their possession at all times.
